text: Am I tied into a contract? Nope, no contracts here. You can pause or cancel anytime. Can I exclude ingredients? Yes! You have the ability to edit individual meals, where you can remove ingredients/components from all meals except for snacks. What if I don't like a meal on my menu? You can swap out any dish on the menu. We have 80+ different dish options for you to choose from each week. Can I enter my own macros? Absolutely. We have a special custom macros plan for this. You enter your goal macros and we get working on a menu that matches them. Up to what point can I make changes to my delivery? You can edit your menu, skip, pause, change your delivery address or delivery timing anytime up to 48 hours before your delivery - all from the app! How long do the meals last? The meals last up to 3 days in the fridge. What oils do you cook with? We cook predominantly with extra virgin olive oil, and don't use any seed oils. You'll find some dessert options with coconut oil or butter too. What type of packaging does your food come in? Our food comes

you cook with? We cook predominantly with extra virgin olive oil, and don't use any seed oils. You'll find some dessert options with coconut oil or butter too. What type of packaging does your food come in? Our food comes in easy to recycle clip lids, bagasse compostable plates/containers. Hot meal dishes have a recyclable plastic liner to improve food safety and this is also oven safe. Our meal plates/containers are oven and microwave proof. How do I pause my subscription? To put your subscription on hold, sign in to your account, go to 'Account Settings', and choose 'Pause Subscription'. You can set the duration of the pause according to your needs. What are the delivery times and is weekend delivery available? Yes, delivery is available on weekends too. Your meals are delivered either on the same day or the day before, depending on the time slot you select. Delivery time options are: Morning Period: 7 AM - 11 AM Evening Period: 6 PM - 10 PM Do you deliver to all areas in Bahrain? Yes, deliveries are available anywhere in Bahrain. Calo Now through Talabat for instant meal delivery across the country. Calo On Demand for flexible, customer scheduled delivery options. Calo Catering for events, meetings, and occasions. B2B & Corporate Partnerships supporting offices, gyms, and health focused organizations. Total Customization in the Calo App gives you 100% control to swap meals, build dishes from scratch, and remove any ingredients.
Monday: Grilled chicken with quinoa Vegetable stir fry Beef salad Tuesday: Salmon with brown rice Chicken wrap Lentil soup

Calo Meal Plans Overview Calo offers personalized meal plans designed based on your goals, preferences, and lifestyle. Meals are prepared by chefs and designed by nutritionists. Meals are delivered fresh daily and are ready to eat. Available Meal Plan Types: Balanced Plan: A well-rounded meal plan that provides all essential nutrients needed for general health and daily energy. High Protein Plan: Focused on increasing protein intake to support muscle growth, strength, and recovery. Low Carb Plan: Low in carbohydrates and higher in healthy fats and vegetables. Suitable for weight loss and low-carb lifestyles. Vegetarian Plan: Plant-based meals made with vegetables, grains, and vegetarian-friendly ingredients. Chef’s Picks Plan: A selection of meals designed for taste and variety rather than strict nutritional goals. Custom Macros Plan: Allows users to define their own macronutrient targets (protein, carbs, fats). Designed for athletes and advanced users. Meal Customization: Customers can choose: - Breakfast - Lunch - Dinner - Snacks A minimum of 2 meals per day is required, including at least lunch or dinner. Subscription Options: Customers can select how many days per week they receive meals. A minimum of 5 days per week is required. Billing Options: - Weekly - Monthly - 3-month subscription

Billing Options: - Weekly - Monthly - 3-month subscription Pricing: Meal plans start from approximately: - BHD 3 per meal - BHD 2 per breakfast Key Features: - Meals are personalized based on fitness goals such as weight loss, muscle gain, or maintenance. - Customers can choose meals and swap dishes they do not like. - Over 80 meal options are available each week. - Meals are prepared with fresh, natural ingredients. - Customers can exclude allergens or unwanted ingredients. - Plans are flexible and can be paused, skipped, or modified. Delivery: - Meals are delivered daily. - Meals are fresh and ready to eat (just heat and eat). - Changes to delivery or meals can typically be made up to 24–48 hours in advance. Flexibility: - No long-term contracts. - Customers can cancel anytime. - Plans can be adjusted based on changing goals or schedules.

Calo Policies and Terms Subscription Policy: Calo operates on a subscription-based model. By subscribing, customers agree to recurring charges based on the selected plan (weekly, monthly, etc.). Subscriptions continue automatically until paused or canceled by the customer. Cancellation Policy: Customers can cancel their subscription before the first delivery if they contact support before the order is dispatched. After the first delivery is confirmed, cancellations are not allowed, but subscriptions can be paused instead. Customers may cancel shortly after placing an order (in some cases within a limited time window). After that, cancellation may not be possible for that delivery. Pause and Skip Policy: Customers can pause their subscription at any time through the app, as long as the next order has not already been dispatched. Customers can: - Skip deliveries - Reschedule deliveries - Edit meals These changes must usually be made before a cutoff time (typically the day before delivery or up to 24–48 hours in advance). Delivery Policy: Meals are delivered daily to the address provided by the customer. Delivery times are estimates and may vary. If the customer is not available at the delivery address, meals may be left at the door or reception area depending on

Meals are delivered daily to the address provided by the customer. Delivery times are estimates and may vary. If the customer is not available at the delivery address, meals may be left at the door or reception area depending on the location and instructions. Customers are responsible for properly storing meals after delivery. In cases of delays due to external factors (such as weather), deliveries may be rescheduled or refunded/credited. Refund Policy: Calo generally does not provide refunds for subscription payments after cancellation. In some cases: - Missed deliveries or failed service may result in credits or refunds - Cancelled orders may be refunded as credits instead of cash Payment Policy: Customers authorize Calo to charge their selected payment method automatically for recurring subscription fees. Payments are typically charged in advance for the upcoming subscription period. Additional fees (taxes, delivery fees) may apply. Modification Policy: Customers can modify their meals, delivery time, and preferences before a cutoff time (usually the day before delivery). After the cutoff time, no changes can be made to that delivery. Food Safety and Responsibility: Customers are responsible for inspecting meals upon delivery. Once delivered, customers are responsible for: - Proper storage - Safe consumption Calo

day before delivery). After the cutoff time, no changes can be made to that delivery. Food Safety and Responsibility: Customers are responsible for inspecting meals upon delivery. Once delivered, customers are responsible for: - Proper storage - Safe consumption Calo is not responsible for issues arising after delivery if meals are not handled properly. Account and Usage Policy: Customers must provide accurate account and delivery information. Users must be at least 18 years old to place orders. By using the app, customers agree to all terms and conditions. Flexibility Policy: Calo allows: - Pausing subscriptions - Skipping deliveries - Changing meals Customers can manage everything directly through the app. There are no long-term contracts, and subscriptions can be adjusted based on user needs.
